description:
Three Sisters Backcountry offers unforgettable backcountry ski and mountain experiences in the heart of the Central Oregon Cascades. Known for the iconic Tam Rim Yurts and the Skyline Hut-to-Hut Ski Traverse, Three Sisters Backcountry has been connecting adventurers with Oregon's winter wilderness since 2008.

Guests can experience multi-day ski traverses, backcountry lodging, and self-propelled mountain adventures surrounded by stunning alpine scenery, old-growth forests, and the rugged beauty of the Three Sisters region. The Tam Rim Yurts provide a unique backcountry retreat, while the Skyline Traverse offers an immersive hut-to-hut experience across some of Central Oregon's most spectacular winter terrain.

Founded by local outdoor enthusiasts and now stewarded by longtime mountain professionals Syver and Lisa Pearson, Three Sisters Backcountry continues a tradition built on community, adventure, stewardship, and a deep love for the mountains.
name: Three Sisters Backcountry

description: Sheri’s primary emphasis during every photo session is creating a comfortable, relaxed experience while capturing genuine, meaningful moments. Clients appreciate the calm, no-stress flow of the session, making the experience enjoyable, personal, and truly memorable.

description: Mexican and American bistro serving hand-cut steaks, fresh seafood, sizzling fajitas, and margaritas in Redmond, Oregon.
long_description:
Madaline's Grill & Steak House brings together bold Mexican classics, hand-cut steaks, fresh seafood, and generous portions in one Redmond restaurant. Whether you're stopping in for lunch, planning dinner, or meeting friends for margaritas, there's something on the menu for everyone.

From sizzling fajitas and fresh tacos to enchiladas, seafood plates, and house-made salsas, the kitchen serves bold, made-fresh favorites every day. The $20 Lunch & Dinner Menu features steak, seafood, and signature entrées like Quesabirria Beef Ravioli, Stuffed Salmon, Stuffed Sole, USDA Choice T-Bone Steak, Top Sirloin, and Coulotte Steak.

Voted Best Lunch in Central Oregon 2025 by The Source Weekly. Open daily for dine-in and takeout.
name: Madaline's Grill & Steak House

description: Tabletop game haven, cafe & cocktail bar in downtown Redmond. Serving breakfast, lunch, and dinner with craft cocktails and Thump espresso.
hours: Tues-Thurs: 9am-10pm | Fri-Sat: 9am-11pm | Sun: 9am-10pm | Closed Monday | Cocktail Bar opens 11am
long_description: Blending craft cocktails and high quality Thump espresso with the joy of tabletop games, Pangaea Guild Hall is a quiet haven for everyone to relax and feel at home. Serving breakfast, lunch, and dinner with a rotating selection of freshly baked goods and desserts, Pangaea is the perfect stop for a morning coffee, an evening cocktail, and everything in between. Whether you just need a quick coffee and a bite to eat, or are planning to stay and play in one of our private game rooms, the Guild Hall's doors are open.
name: Pangaea Guild Hall

description: Step-by-step paint parties, painting tutorials, and online art membership. Join a guided paint party at SCP Hotel Redmond or learn from home with online tutorials.
hours: By appointment - check website for upcoming paint party dates
address: SCP Hotel Downtown Redmond, Redmond, OR 97756
long_description:
At Imaginary Rebel Art Studio LLC, we provide step by step painting tutorials and online art membership. Our mission is to help people discover their inner artist and create beautiful art pieces. Our team of experienced artists is passionate about sharing their knowledge and skills with art enthusiasts from all over the world.

We believe that art has the power to transform lives and bring people together. That's why we have created a community of like-minded individuals who share our love for art. As a member of our online art membership, you'll get access to exclusive tutorials, live streams, and a supportive community of artists. We offer a wide range of painting tutorials for all skill levels, from beginner to advanced.

Join us today and unleash your creativity!
name: Imaginary Rebel Art Studio

description: Family owned and operated towing serving Redmond, Bend and Central Oregon since 2020. Light, medium and heavy duty towing, recovery, and emergency roadside services.
address: 2241 SW 1st St Suite C, Redmond, OR 97756
long_description:
Family owned and operated since 2010, Litsis Towing has been serving Redmond, Bend and the surrounding Central Oregon areas since 2020. Fair prices, superior quality, and exceptional customer service are guaranteed when working with Litsis Towing.

**Services we offer:**
- Light Duty Towing (standard size vehicles)
- Motorcycle Towing
- Medium Duty Towing (larger pickups, box vans, RVs, Sprinter vans, big rigs, camp trailers)
- Heavy Duty / Recovery Towing (semi truck/trailer, RV, commercial, medium and heavy recovery)
- Specialty Towing (custom, classic, and high-end vehicles, electric vehicles)
- Emergency Roadside Services (lockouts, jumpstarts, tire changes, fuel delivery, battery installs)

Honest. Clean. Professional.
name: Litsis Towing

description: Trusted garage door service across Central Oregon since 1983. Same-day repairs, 24/7 emergency service, professional installation, maintenance, opener repair, and commercial solutions. Serving Redmond, Bend, Prineville, Madras, Sisters, and Sunriver.
address: 704 SW Forest Ave Ste 102., Redmond, OR 97756
long_description:
Cascade Garage Door has served homeowners and businesses across Central Oregon for over 40 years. When your door needs attention, you get reliable service, honest work, and repairs done right the first time.

**Services:**
• Same-day garage door repair for homes and businesses
• 24/7 emergency garage door service
• Professional garage door installation — high-quality doors built to last in Central Oregon's conditions
• Preventive maintenance and routine tune-ups
• Garage door opener repair, replacement, and smart upgrades (Liftmaster, myQ)
• Commercial garage door solutions for businesses, builders, and large-scale projects

**Brands installed and serviced:** Amarr, Hörmann, Liftmaster, and more

**Serving:** Redmond, Bend, Prineville, Madras, Sisters, and Sunriver

With 700+ five-star reviews, Cascade Garage Door is Central Oregon's trusted choice for honest pricing, experienced local technicians, and fast same-day service.
name: Cascade Garage Door

description: Central Oregon winery, vineyard, wedding venue, and live music destination in Terrebonne. Offering wine tasting, wood-fired pizzas, wine club memberships, concerts, and private events with stunning Three Sisters mountain views.
hours: Tasting Room: Daily 12pm-5pm | Live Music: Thu 5pm-8pm, Fri & Sat 6pm-9pm
address: 70450 NW Lower Valley Dr, Terrebonne, OR 97760
long_description:
Faith Hope and Charity Vineyards is a premier Central Oregon winery offering unforgettable vineyard weddings, live music events, and private celebrations with stunning mountain views. We're more than just a destination — we're a part of life's cherished moments.

Our lush vineyard landscape and sweeping views of the Three Sisters set the stage for unforgettable gatherings. Each bottle we craft tells the story of our dedication to quality, from vine to glass. Join us in the tasting room to savor exceptional wines and heartfelt hospitality.

**What We Offer:**
• Award-winning wines — cold-hardy estate-grown varietals plus Merlot, Syrah, and Pinot Noir sourced from Columbia Valley and Eola-Amity
• Wine tasting room open daily with French, American, and European varietals
• Wood-fired pizzas and appetizers made with locally-sourced ingredients
• Wedding venue — recognized as Source Weekly's Best of Central Oregon #1 Wedding Venue
• Live music year-round — concerts under the stars, wine release parties, winemaker dinners, and more
• Wine club memberships with exclusive varietals
• Private and corporate event hosting
• Sustainable, environmentally-friendly winemaking practices
name: Faith Hope and Charity Vineyards & Winery

description: Central Oregon's largest furniture and mattress destination, proudly serving the region since 1962. A 24,000 sqft multi-building showroom with 2,500 items in stock, including living room, bedroom, dining, and office furniture and mattresses from brands like Accord Comfort and Copperrest.
hours:
Monday - Friday: 9:00 AM - 6:00 PM
Saturday: 9:00 AM - 5:00 PM
Sunday: 11:00 AM - 4:00 PM
long_description:
Wilson's of Redmond is Central Oregon's largest furniture and mattress destination, proudly serving the region since 1962.

What began on the ground floor of the Redmond Hotel has grown into a multi-building showroom, warehouse, and logistics operation built to support high-volume, high-quality home furnishing needs with 2,500 items in stock.

As a Central Oregon member of the Pacific Furniture Dealers buying group, Wilson's leverages $400M+ in collective purchasing power to secure competitive pricing, reliable inventory, and exclusive product access.

Three generations and over six decades later, Wilson's remains one of Redmond's oldest and most trusted businesses, still keeping it local.
name: Wilson's of Redmond
